Link affordance cases

The migration guide walks through every step, and read the guide before upgrading production.

Billing changes take effect immediately, so review your plan before confirming.

  • Exports run nightly, and the export log shows each run.
The docs said check your quota first, and they were right.

Underlined links read as links: browse the docs mid-sentence.

Color contrast alone can carry it: the API reference sits in this paragraph.

Weight is a cue too: the changelog stands out in bold.

A bottom border works like an underline: status page inline.

Home Pricing

Unstyled links keep browser defaults, like the community forum here.
